text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: /* There's been a change in Parcae's calculations.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
The seven-centimeter gap that controls my fate
has shrunk. But this means nothing. It only
suggests the possibility for change.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My next goal is the Satsuki Sho.
Verification in progress. */
